name: Tacos
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill for 10 minutes.
2. In a large cast iron skillet or safe baking dish, combine ground beef and onion. Cook and stir at high heat until the beef is no longer pink, about 10-12 minutes.
3. Drain excess fat from the beef mixture. Stir in olives, cumin, salt, garlic powder, and pepper.
4. Place taco shells on the upper cooking rack of the grill.
5. Continue cooking the meat mixture with the hood closed for about 5 minutes longer.
6. Stir in chopped tomato. Reduce heat to low and serve tacos from the grill with desired toppings.
7. Makes 12 tacos.
